name: Fledge
short_description: Fledge is a 2D platform game in which the player takes on the role of Corentin, a young pigeon who takes flight to find his idol and become, like him, a great explorer. However, this hasty flight is far from a success... Help him make his dream come true!
detailed_description:
Fledge is a 2D platform game in which the player takes on the role of Corentin, a young pigeon who takes flight to find his idol and become, like him, a great explorer. However, this hasty flight is far from a success...
Help him make his dream come true!

  • Explore Auburn Forest - a place filled with strange vestiges - and help its eccentric inhabitants.
  • Master all the movement mechanics to optimize your speed and move with the grace of a pigeon.
  • Collect crab sticks!
about_the_game:
Fledge is a 2D platform game in which the player takes on the role of Corentin, a young pigeon who takes flight to find his idol and become, like him, a great explorer. However, this hasty flight is far from a success...
Help him make his dream come true!

  • Explore Auburn Forest - a place filled with strange vestiges - and help its eccentric inhabitants.
  • Master all the movement mechanics to optimize your speed and move with the grace of a pigeon.
  • Collect crab sticks!
